description: You are an architectural technician preparing a building permit IFC model for a new two-storey family home. Create an IFC4 project with a name containing 'Hillcrest'. Establish a spatial hierarchy consisting of a Site, a Building, and two Building Storeys: Ground Floor at elevation 0.0 m and First Floor at elevation 3.0 m. Model a staircase assembly connecting the floors, including at least one 'IfcStair' element, one 'IfcStairFlight' element, and one 'IfcRailing' element with exact IFC entity classifications. Save the project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/hillcrest_stairs.ifc.
